name: Rice Cooker – Japanese-Inspired Promo Flyer
svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" viewBox="0 0 1080 1350" width="1080" height="1350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="rc-bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1350" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_BOTTOM"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="rc-sun" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1" gradientUnits="objectBoundingBox">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD_LIGHT"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="rc-sash" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1080" y2="0" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_RED"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_RED_DARK"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="rc-img-fade" x1="0" y1="700" x2="0" y2="920" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP" stop-opacity="0"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP" stop-opacity="0.85"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <clipPath id="rc-img-clip">
      <rect x="140" y="180" width="800" height="740"/>
    </clipPath>
    <clipPath id="rc-sun-clip">
      <rect x="0" y="680" width="1080" height="300"/>
    </clipPath>
  </defs>

  <!-- LAYER 1: deep teal background -->
  <rect width="1080" height="1350" fill="url(#rc-bg)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 2: top identity strip -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="1080" height="88" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.06"/>
  <line x1="0" y1="88" x2="1080" y2="88" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/>

  <!-- LAYER 3: store name left -->
  <text x="56" y="54" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.7" letter-spacing="5">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_NAME</text>
  <text x="56" y="76" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" fill-opacity="0.6" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_URL</text>

  <!-- LAYER 4: logotype box right -->
  <rect x="840" y="12" width="196" height="64" rx="0" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" stroke-width="1" stroke-opacity="0.35"/>
  <rect x="846" y="18" width="184" height="52" rx="0" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" stroke-width="0.4" stroke-opacity="0.2"/>
  <text x="938" y="52" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif" font-size="22" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" letter-spacing="6">PLACEHOLDER_LOGOTYPE</text>

  <!-- LAYER 5: product name centred -->
  <text x="540" y="164" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif"  font-size="72" font-weight="900" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-1">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_LINE1</text>
  <text x="540" y="206" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="18" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" fill-opacity="0.7" letter-spacing="8">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_LINE2</text>

  <!-- LAYER 6: product image zone -->
  <rect x="140" y="220" width="800" height="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_BOTTOM" fill-opacity="0.5"/>
  <g clip-path="url(#rc-img-clip)">
    <image href="PLACEHOLDER_PRODUCT_IMAGE" x="140" y="180" width="800" height="740" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"/>
  </g>
  <rect x="140" y="700" width="800" height="220" fill="url(#rc-img-fade)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 7: rising sun rings clipped to lower half -->
  <g clip-path="url(#rc-sun-clip)">
    <circle cx="540" cy="680" r="380" fill="url(#rc-sun)" fill-opacity="0.13"/>
    <circle cx="540" cy="680" r="340" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.2"/>
    <circle cx="540" cy="680" r="300" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.15"/>
    <circle cx="540" cy="680" r="260" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.12"/>
  </g>

  <!-- LAYER 8: wave pattern band -->
  <rect x="0" y="928" width="1080" height="48" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" fill-opacity="0.1"/>
  <line x1="0" y1="928"  x2="1080" y2="928"  stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.3"/>
  <line x1="0" y1="976"  x2="1080" y2="976"  stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.3"/>
  <path d="M0 952 Q54 932 108 952 Q162 972 216 952 Q270 932 324 952 Q378 972 432 952 Q486 932 540 952 Q594 972 648 952 Q702 932 756 952 Q810 972 864 952 Q918 932 972 952 Q1026 972 1080 952" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.35"/>

  <!-- LAYER 9: spec row -->
  <rect x="0" y="976" width="1080" height="138" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_BOTTOM" fill-opacity="0.5"/>

  <text x="135" y="1026" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="11" font-weight="500" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" fill-opacity="0.6" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC1_LABEL</text>
  <text x="135" y="1064" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif"       font-size="36" font-weight="700" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC1_VALUE</text>
  <circle cx="270" cy="1044" r="3" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" fill-opacity="0.3"/>

  <text x="405" y="1026" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="11" font-weight="500" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" fill-opacity="0.6" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC2_LABEL</text>
  <text x="405" y="1064" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif"       font-size="36" font-weight="700" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC2_VALUE</text>
  <circle cx="540" cy="1044" r="3" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" fill-opacity="0.3"/>

  <text x="675" y="1026" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="11" font-weight="500" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" fill-opacity="0.6" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC3_LABEL</text>
  <text x="675" y="1064" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif"       font-size="36" font-weight="700" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC3_VALUE</text>
  <circle cx="810" cy="1044" r="3" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" fill-opacity="0.3"/>

  <text x="945" y="1026" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="11" font-weight="500" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" fill-opacity="0.6" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC4_LABEL</text>
  <text x="945" y="1064" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif"       font-size="36" font-weight="700" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC4_VALUE</text>

  <line x1="0" y1="1114" x2="1080" y2="1114" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.2"/>
  <text x="540" y="1100" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.35" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_FEATURES_LINE</text>

  <!-- LAYER 10: red price sash -->
  <rect x="0" y="1130" width="1080" height="120" fill="url(#rc-sash)"/>
  <line x1="0" y1="1130" x2="1080" y2="1130" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.5"/>
  <line x1="0" y1="1250" x2="1080" y2="1250" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.2"/>

  <text x="56"  y="1186" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="13" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.6" letter-spacing="4">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_LABEL</text>
  <text x="56"  y="1238" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif"      font-size="72" font-weight="900" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_VALUE</text>

  <line x1="680" y1="1144" x2="680" y2="1240" stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.2"/>

  <text x="868" y="1192" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="13" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.55" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_CTA_LABEL</text>
  <text x="868" y="1232" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif"      font-size="38" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" letter-spacing="-1">PLACEHOLDER_CTA_WORD</text>

  <!-- LAYER 11: dark bottom strip -->
  <rect x="0" y="1250" width="1080" height="100" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_BOTTOM"/>

  <text x="56"  y="1296" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" fill-opacity="0.8">PLACEHOLDER_TRUST1</text>
  <text x="310" y="1296" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" fill-opacity="0.8">PLACEHOLDER_TRUST2</text>
  <text x="620" y="1296" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" fill-opacity="0.8">PLACEHOLDER_TRUST3</text>
  <line x1="56" y1="1312" x2="1024" y2="1312" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_GOLD" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.15"/>
  <text x="540" y="1336" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.3" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_FOOTER_TEXT</text>
</svg>

PLACEHOLDER_FEATURES_LINE.label: Features line
PLACEHOLDER_FEATURES_LINE.default: Non-stick · Delay Timer · Auto Shut-Off · Dishwasher Safe
